hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, customer data, routing status, exceptions and audit evidence into a unified compliance workflow tailored for digital asset exchanges.

problem_title: Travel Rule data remains disconnected across systems
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to trace originator and beneficiary data when Travel Rule messages and exceptions sit outside unified workflows. This disconnect slows review processes and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible regulatory reporting.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates originator, beneficiary and exception data from multiple Travel Rule providers into a unified compliance workflow that supports case management, audit evidence and clear review processes.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to case review
workflow_description: SFTY organizes Travel Rule message routing, exception handling and data exchange into structured cases with evidence for compliance review and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status, and exceptions into one structured compliance workflow for digital asset exchanges and VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY manages Travel Rule exceptions by creating cases for failed, incomplete, or high-risk events with structured workflows for review, resolution, and audit-ready evidence collection.
faq_3_question: How is Travel Rule audit evidence preserved?
faq_3_answer: Travel Rule audit evidence is preserved through tamper-resistant logs, decision history, linked cases, and supporting documentation accessible for internal or regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing Travel Rule providers, integrating their outputs into a connected workflow without disrupting current systems or processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule provider software?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace provider software but acts as a compliance control layer that structures and connects provider data into operational workflows and reports.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule data exchange workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports IVMS101 data integration, case management, exceptions and audit evidence for exchange compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
